Hero.subtitle: Most agents do tasks. Ours understands why people choose, hesitate, and decide.

AgentComparison.label: A Different Kind of Agent
AgentComparison.title: Workers Execute. Ours Understands.

worker.title: Worker Agent
worker.description: Writes code, generates content, runs workflows. Useful — but it can't tell you why your customers chose a competitor.

understanding.title: Understanding Agent
understanding.description: Models how real people think and decide. Motivations, trade-offs, hesitation — the subjective factors that actually drive markets.

AgentComparison.tagline: Understanding people is harder than doing things for them — and far more valuable.

DualRoles.label: How It Works
DualRoles.title: Two Roles. One Understanding.
DualRoles.subtitle: Every research session uses two complementary agent roles

simulator.title: The Simulator
simulator.description: Becomes a specific consumer. Not a statistical average — a real person with real trade-offs, hesitations, and decision logic.
simulator.capability: Draws from 300K+ persona models to simulate individual cognitive patterns, emotional responses, and decision frameworks. 85% behavioral consistency with real humans.

researcher.title: The Researcher
researcher.description: Asks the right questions, probes deeper, draws out what people can't easily articulate. Part interviewer, part analyst.

Methods.label: Research Modalities
Methods.title: Five Ways to Understand
Methods.subtitle: Go beyond surveys. Run the kind of research that actually reveals why people decide.

interview.title: 1-on-1 Deep Interview
interview.description: In-depth conversations with AI personas to surface hidden motivations. 5–10 personas per session, each with distinct decision patterns.

focusGroup.title: Focus Group
focusGroup.description: 3–8 personas debate in real time. Watch opinions clash, consensus form, and social dynamics emerge.

panel.title: Panel Simulation
panel.description: Large-scale discussions across consumer segments. Get multi-dimensional market perspective in minutes, not months.

persona.title: Persona Vectorization
persona.description: Vector-embedded persona models for precise audience matching, similarity search, and cohort analysis.

simulation.title: Behavioral Simulation
simulation.description: Simulate real-world decision journeys — from first impression to final purchase — and find where people drop off.

UseCases.label: Use Cases
UseCases.title: Built for Teams That Need to Understand People

productTest.title: Product Validation
productTest.description: Test market reactions before you build. Know what resonates and what falls flat.

pricing.title: Pricing Strategy
pricing.description: Understand willingness to pay and price sensitivity across segments.

brand.title: Brand Positioning
brand.description: See how your target audience actually perceives your brand versus competitors.

content.title: Content Testing
content.description: Predict which messages land and which ones miss before you publish.

journey.title: Journey Mapping
journey.description: Simulate the full decision path and pinpoint where conversion breaks down.

persona.title: Audience Testing
persona.description: Validate your positioning with simulated audiences before going live.

resonance.title: Content Resonance
resonance.description: Find out if your content connects emotionally — before you hit publish.

community.title: Community Simulation
community.description: Preview how your community will react to new ideas and strategies.

Stats.title: The Subjective World Model
Stats.subtitle: We don't just track what people do. We model why they think the way they do.
Stats.modelDescription: Traditional research measures behavior. Atypica models the inner world — the values, fears, emotions, and social pressures that shape every decision.

CTA.title: Understand why people decide
CTA.subtitle: Run your first study in minutes. No setup, no survey design, no waiting.

UseCaseScenarios.title: AI Persona Research in Action
UseCaseScenarios.description: See how AI Personas built from in-depth interviews transform research across different scenarios. From testing concepts to uncovering insights, our AI Personas provide authentic responses through structured interview processes.

testing.title: Testing
testing.description: Interview AI Personas to test marketing messages, product concepts, and campaign ideas with authentic reactions.

planning.title: Planning
planning.description: Create strategic frameworks by interviewing AI Personas about preferences and priorities to inform roadmaps.

insights.title: Insights
insights.description: Uncover behavioral patterns and motivations through interviews with AI Personas representing target audiences.

creation.title: Creation
creation.description: Brainstorm and co-create with AI Personas to generate innovative ideas and validate creative concepts.

UseCases.title: AI Persona Research Studies
UseCases.description: Explore real case studies showcasing how AI Personas built from in-depth interviews and expert interviews provide deep consumer insights for better business decisions.

aiInterviews.title: AI-Led Interviews
aiInterviews.description: Conduct natural conversations with AI personas to uncover deep motivations and key decision drivers.

behaviorAnalysis.title: Behavior Analysis
behaviorAnalysis.description: Identify emotional triggers, cognitive biases, and cultural factors that influence purchasing decisions.

instantInsights.title: Instant Insights
instantInsights.description: Generate comprehensive insights in minutes instead of traditional weeks-long research processes.

PersonaSimulationSection.title: AI Personas from Deep Interviews
PersonaSimulationSection.description: Advanced AI Personas that simulate authentic human cognition. Whether using our extensive library or creating private personas from your own interview data, these agents maintain consistent personalities and behavioral frameworks to provide realistic insights.
PersonaSimulationSection.technologyQuote: Our deep interview AI Personas are a form of high-precision consumer simulation technology. You can also apply this same powerful technology to your own interview transcripts to create secure, proprietary AI Personas for your exclusive use.
PersonaSimulationSection.technologyDescription: These agents maintain consistent cognitive patterns, emotional responses, and decision-making frameworks that enable authentic research conversations - achieving 85% human-like accuracy in behavioral simulation.
PersonaSimulationSection.learnMoreLink: Learn more about AI Personas from Deep Interviews
PersonaSimulationSection.accuracyDescription: Human-like behavioral consistency in AI persona responses
PersonaSimulationSection.differentiatorDescription: Unlike traditional survey data or statistical models, our AI Personas are sophisticated behavioral simulations that maintain consistent personality traits and decision-making logic in new contexts.

syntheticAgents.title: 300,000 AI Personas (Social Media)
syntheticAgents.description: Based on social media data analysis

multiDimensional.title: Human AI Personas (Proprietary)
multiDimensional.description: Build from your own private interview data

PersonaSimulationSection.ctaTitle: Build Your Custom AI Research Panel
PersonaSimulationSection.ctaDescription: Create private, high-fidelity AI Personas from your own interview data, or leverage our extensive library to discover deep consumer insights.

TestimonialSection.title: Research Teams Love Our Results
TestimonialSection.description: See how professionals use AI persona research to understand consumer behavior and make better decisions faster.
TestimonialSection.timeDescription: Get insights in minutes, not weeks of research.

productManager.quote: We needed to understand how different user segments would react to our new feature. Atypica's AI Personas provided authentic feedback through detailed interviews, giving us insights in hours that would have taken weeks of traditional user research.
productManager.author: Elena Rodriguez
productManager.title: Senior Product Manager

marketingDirector.quote: The AI Personas built from deep interviews were incredibly realistic in their responses. We tested multiple campaign messages through persona interviews and identified the most effective approach before spending on actual ads.
marketingDirector.author: Ben Carter
marketingDirector.title: Marketing Director

founder.quote: As a startup, we couldn't afford traditional focus groups or extensive user interviews. Atypica's AI Persona research gave us deep behavioral insights and validated our assumptions at a fraction of the cost.
founder.author: Sophie Chen
founder.title: Founder & CEO
